mapper.select: select mp.stock_seq as stockSeq, sm.stock_code as stockCode, sm.stock_name as stockName, mp.quantity as quantity, mp.avg_price as avgPrice from mock_portfolio mp join stock_master sm on mp.stock_seq = sm.stock_seq where mp.user_seq = #{user_seq} and mp.quantity > 0 order by mp.updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: insert into mock_portfolio(user_seq, stock_seq, quantity, avg_price, updated_at) values(#{user_seq}, #{stock_seq}, #{quantity}, #{avg_price}, now())
mapper.update: update mock_portfolio set quantity = #{quantity}, avg_price = #{avg_price}, updated_at = now() where portfolio_seq = #{portfolio_seq}
